text.message: Orange you should go for the 3:1 before black
this early solo has been pretty brutal
look at the scores, ports, and devs
that's a worry, what they have is real
Orange is the block for sure
Black how many VPs you got
blue cities up 2x and plays one road, he wins
you are more scared of the guy on 5 pts that might getroad, than the guys on 7 points, down devs, 2:1 ports, etc.
i was on 5 when you did it
i didn't want him to move the knight onto me
